description_long: This is a large, multi-structure residential house complex surrounded by a perimeter wall and landscaped with various trees and shrubs. The property features several interconnected buildings with brown gabled and hipped roofs, light-colored exterior walls, and multiple visible windows. There is a prominent driveway leading to the main entrance, and a spacious courtyard area with a circular driveway and a swimming pool. The grounds are well-maintained, with palm trees and dense foliage providing privacy and shade. The architectural style blends traditional and modern suburban elements, with a focus on comfort and spaciousness. The layout suggests multiple entry points and a design intended for family living and entertaining.
description: A large, multi-building residential house complex with brown gabled roofs, light walls, landscaped grounds, and a perimeter wall. Features include a driveway, pool, and numerous windows.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house complex from an angle highlighting the main driveway, pool area, and the arrangement of trees along the perimeter.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the property from above the main entrance, emphasizing the driveway, front yard, and the clustered arrangement of the buildings.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the house, showing the backyard, additional trees, and the full extent of the perimeter wall.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the pool area and the back of the house, with a clear view of the landscaped garden and secondary building structures.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide driveway, steps, and a covered porch with columns and decorative landscaping.
